body_txt: This is a kind of spell or power that induces sleep in the target. Typically, it's not the character's only ability; it may be one application of Functional Magic , Charm Person , Compelling Voice , or Magic Music (in the form of a Super-Effective Lullaby ). In video games, this will take the form of a Status Effect . Instant Sedation is the pharmacological equivalent. If the sleep is forced by someone being slipped something in their meal, see Slipping a Mickey . Compare The Paralyzer .
